sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (co = '2300' and TP <> '[version]'  or co <> '[version]' and TP = '2300' or '[version]' = '(none)')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, BusCat, Contract,uwyr) (Select '[batchID]-data2', Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, BusCat, Contract, UWYR from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
update TransX set Amt1 = -Amt1 where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GL = '2879900' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1819900'
update TransX set BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2879900'
update TransX set BusCat = '31' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '20'
update TransX set Co = TP, TP = '2300' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2300'
update TransX set Contract = '57', TTY = '841' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2006' and PC = '4050200231'
update TransX set Contract = '56', TTY = '841' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2006' and PC = '4070200195'
update TransX set Contract = '536', PC = '4070100087', TTY = '843' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2007' and PC in ('4070100087','4070200194')
update TransX set TTY = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5519900'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, BusCat, Contract,UWYR, TTY, Flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, BusCat, Contract,UWYR, TTY, 'pass1' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, BusCat, Contract,UWYR,TTY)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and flex1 is null

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, PK, BusCat, Contract,UWYR, TTY) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, '40' as PK, BusCat, Contract,UWYR, TTY from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, PK, BusCat, Contract,UWYR, TTY) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, '50' as PK, BusCat, Contract,UWYR, TTY from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Txt = 'DAC HUD [yyyy-mm-dd]', Flex1 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, BusCat, UWYR, Contract, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
